generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARObjectTracksDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for speed data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for steering angle data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR-derived object tracks data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARObjectTracksDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data from Intel Deepsense D435i",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database for timeseries data storage",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted, LiDARObjectTracksDataTransmitted, DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and system management",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between Physical and Digital Twins",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for prototyping and data processing scripts",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppROS2Nodes : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and DBSCAN clustering",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data visualization and report generation for system performance monitoring and troubleshooting",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemPerformanceMonitoringInsight, ADASTroubleshootingInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading Adaptive Cruise Control logic to Digital Twin for resource-constrained ECUs",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCOffloadingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, ACCDisableAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance SystemPerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring system performance for operational decisions"
]

instance ADASTroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Troubleshooting ADAS functionality for developers"
]

instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enablement of Adaptive Cruise Control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote disablement of Adaptive Cruise Control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting desired speed for ACC",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking triggered remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation for speed control by converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle with Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium chassis, NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller, organized into lower and upper chassis layers",
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity with decentralized ROS2 packages for data processing and control logic",
    base:contains DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlLogicModel, SQLDatabase, ROS2Middleware, MATLABSimulink, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, Python38, CppROS2Nodes
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity for operator interaction and decision-making",
    base:contains DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for integration with external systems",
    base:contains ROS2Middleware
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "A 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted with a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium chassis, NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller, organized into lower and upper chassis layers for control and autonomy components",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and steering commands from the DT to the physical twin, converted to motor voltage and servo control signals by the Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity, and synchronized clocks across components with 100 ms accuracy per 3GPP 22.185."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing), User Entity (UI), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-system and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for real-time ADAS control and monitoring, and design phase for ADAS development and validation as a cyber-physical experimentation facility."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 DDS for intra-system communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms latency, Data Translation FE handling serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano onboard the vehicle; Digital Twin Entity components hosted on cloud servers; Data Storage external to vehicle in cloud-based SQL database."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework; ISO 15622 for ACC performance class I requirements; 3GPP 22.185 for V2V communication latency."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with 100 ms latency requirement for real-time control; however, specific cybersecurity measures and safety protocols not detailed in the document."
]
